name: Remote Actions
description: Send authenticated commands from the web dashboard to the iOS app for WHOOP haptics and alarms.

hooks.ios: Registers RemoteActionsCoordinator with AddonLoader; maintains device WebSocket and executes allowlisted BLE commands.
hooks.web: Adds remote-actions panel with device picker, haptic controls, and live command status.
hooks.server: Registers POST /api/commands, device registry, and WebSocket delivery via internal/live hub.
